title: Nearly a century of wondering: The American UFO saga, in reality and in fiction
description: UFOs have intrigued people for decades, with sightings and investigations dating back to the first widely reported one in 1947

title: As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us?
description: For generations, human beings have wondered: What would alien life from another planet be like

title: Missing Air Force general with ties to UFO community ‘planned not to be found,’ wife says in chilling new 911 call
description: The wife revealed several clues as to why she thought he deliberately vanished.

title: GOP’s Tim Burchett says US ‘would come unglued’ if UFO briefing was released in bombshell interview on alien life
description: REPUBLICAN Representative Tim Burchett has claimed that the truth behind alien life could be the United States' undoing. Burchett, known for his statements on the existence of extraterrestrial life and UFOs, says Americans would be unable to sleep if these truths came to light. Burchett, a Representative for the state of Tennessee, made these shocking...

title: Twist in missing UFO general as wife says he 'planned not to be found' in chilling 911
description: A case involving a former US Air Force General purportedly tied to UFO research has taken a strange turn after his wife gave the impression that he "planned not to be found"
